recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: Altar
recommendations.overview: A young family find themselves in serious danger when they move to an isolated haunted house in the Yorkshire Moors.

recommendations.title: ME!ME!ME!
recommendations.overview: An anime-obsessed young man fantasizes about his favorite voluptuous heroines, but his sex-addled dream quickly transforms into a nightmare which threatens to consume him.

recommendations.title: Burial Ground
recommendations.overview: A cursed country estate is besieged by horny houseguests, undead Etruscans, and the unusual relationship between a mother and her young son.

recommendations.title: Daisies
recommendations.overview: Two teenage girls embark on a series of destructive pranks in which they consume and destroy the world around them.

recommendations.title: Offseason
recommendations.overview: Upon receiving a mysterious letter that her mother's grave has been vandalized, Marie travels to the desolate island town where she's buried. Just as she arrives, the island closes for the season, leaving Marie trapped in a nightmare.

recommendations.title: Pet Sematary: Bloodlines
recommendations.overview: In 1969, young Jud Crandall has dreams of leaving his hometown behind, but soon discovers sinister secrets buried within and is forced to confront a dark family history that forever binds him to Ludlow.

recommendations.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension
recommendations.overview: Using a special camera that can see spirits, a family must protect their daughter from an evil entity with a sinister plan.

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: Burnt Offerings
recommendations.overview: A family moves into a large old mansion in the countryside which seems to have a mysterious and sinister power over its new residents.
